title: tocoyena costanensis subsp. costanensis
intro: Tocoyena costanensis subsp. costanensis, also known as the Brazilian forest tree or Tocoyena, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tocoyena costanensis subsp. costanensis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
